name: plain-editor
description: A lightweight code editor built with Tauri and Rust.

scripts.format: prettier --write app tests scripts/plain package.json features.json AGENTS.md progress.md docs/**/*.md vite.config.ts playwright.config.ts vitest.config.ts tsconfig*.json
scripts.format:check: prettier --check app tests scripts/plain package.json features.json AGENTS.md progress.md docs/**/*.md vite.config.ts playwright.config.ts vitest.config.ts tsconfig*.json
scripts.lint: oxlint --deny-warnings app tests scripts/plain vite.config.ts playwright.config.ts vitest.config.ts
scripts.check: pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm check:features && pnpm test:unit && pnpm build:frontend && pnpm check:architecture && pnpm check:bundle && pnpm rust:fmt && pnpm rust:clippy && pnpm rust:test
